resources.string: Welcome to the Investigation screen! This is your main dashboard for tracking evidence and identifying the ghost.
The Journal is where you record evidence found during the investigation.
Select evidence to filter the list of possible ghosts. You can also tap on ghost names to see more details.
Keep an eye on the status bar for your current sanity, the remaining preparation time, and the current weather.
The toolbar gives you access to various tools like the BPM counter, Timers, and Operation Configurations.
Configure the map, difficulty, and weather for your investigation here. These settings affect the ghost\'s behavior and your rewards.
Select the location for your next investigation. Larger maps offer higher rewards but are more dangerous.
Choose how challenging the investigation will be. Higher difficulties increase ghost aggression and multiplier.
Check or select the weather conditions. Weather affects visibility and can impact certain ghost behaviors.
Monitor the ambient temperature. Freezing temperatures are a key piece of evidence.
Track the remaining preparation time. Once it hits zero, the ghost can start hunting!
Control the building\'s main fuse box. Keep the lights on to preserve your sanity!
Record a teammate\'s unfortunate passing to adjust your investigation strategy.
Use sanity pills to restore your mental state and delay the onset of ghost hunts.
Your sanity drops over time in the dark. Use sanity pills to restore it, and be careful – low sanity makes you a target!
Identify secondary evidence traits to narrow down the ghost type. Some traits are unique to specific ghosts.
Filter the list to only show traits that are unique to a single ghost. This is often the fastest way to confirm a specific identity.
Narrow down the list by selecting a specific category, such as "Behavior" or "Abilities", to find relevant evidence faster.
Review the specific details of your current operation, including ghost behavior and investigation settings.
Use these timers to track smudge stick effectiveness, hunt durations, and fingerprint persistence.
Track how long a smudge stick prevents the ghost from hunting. Different ghosts have different prevention durations.
Monitor the length of an active hunt. This helps you know when it\'s safe to come out of hiding.
Track the minimum time between hunts. Use this window to move between hiding spots or gather evidence.
When linked, the cooldown timer starts automatically as soon as the hunt duration timer finishes, providing a seamless timeline.
Track how long fingerprints will remain visible. This helps you know if you need to re-check a door or window.
Measure the ghost\'s movement speed (BPM) to help identify it. Different ghosts have distinct walking speeds.
See how the current investigation settings, such as weather or ghost speed modifiers, are affecting the ghost\'s movement.
Choose which measurement (Instant, Average, or Weighted) to apply to your investigation to help narrow down the ghost type.
Tap along with the ghost\'s footsteps to see its movement speed graphed in real-time. Use the dropdowns to adjust the view.
